name: Papoutsanis S.A.
summary: Papoutsanis S.A. produces and sells body, face, and hair care products in Greece and internationally. The company offers shower gels, shampoos, hand washes, face cleansers, hand and body lotions, body oils, hair conditioners, hair masks and oils, hand creams, soaps, bathing and shaving foams, liquid soaps, antiseptic hand gels, fragrances, and soap noodles, as well as accessories, such as paper cases, dental and shaving kits, shower and bath caps, sewing kits, vanity sets, nail files, cotton tips and pads, class caps, stirrers, shoe-shine sponges, bath sponges, slippers, and display stands. The company offers its products under the Olivia, HAIRCHIC, KARAVAKI, Aromatics, Natura, Green Olive Soap, Glycerine Soap, L'OCCITANE Hotel ?menities, Korres, Sarbacane, Olive Care, Olivia Fusion, Skin Essentials, For Kids, Ahava, Eau De Grece, and SOAP NOODLES brands. It also exports to Europe, America, Asia and Oceania. The company was formerly known as Plias SA. Papoutsanis S.A. was founded in 1870 and is based in Chalkida, Greece.
